signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Fully Resolved, Triggering XRP Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Fully Resolved, Triggering XRP Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's 10% price gain in April 2026, breaking above $1.50 to ~$1.42.[1] This resolution, combined with the full-scale rollout of Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin on XRP Ledger and Ethereum, has boosted
